title: Wave5 G3 uninstall:еҘ— B-жЁӘзәҝжҖ»з»“еҚЎ + дәәиҜқеҢ–(bootstrap=жҳҜ вҶ’ дәәиҜқ;иЈёи®Ўж•° removed=N/skipped=N вҶ’ з»“жһңиҜҚ)
description: Fix G3 in uninstall.ts. The plan preview leaks jargon `bootstrap=жҳҜ` (yesNoLabel over raw stage keys) and the summary leaks raw counts `removed=129 skipped=16`. De-jargon: the plan summary describes each stage as a human action sentence (not `key=жҳҜ/еҗҰ`); the summary card uses the B-жЁӘзәҝ title (TASK-001 headerRule, already routed via the shared renderer) and human result words ('е·Іжё…зҗҶ N йЎ№' / 'е·ІжҳҜе№ІеҮҖ' / 'е·Іи·іиҝҮ') instead of raw `removed=/skipped=/errors=` counts. Reuse the install summary card shape so install вҶ” uninstall stay symmetric.
action: uninstall.ts printUninstallPlanSummary (~line 1002): replace the `cli.uninstall.plan.actions` line built from yesNoLabel(...) per stage with a per-stage human action list вҖ” one localized sentence per ENABLED stage (e.g. 'е°Ҷжё…зҗҶ Skills дёҺ hook и„ҡжң¬') and a muted 'е°Ҷдҝқз•ҷ' note for skipped, instead of `bootstrap=жҳҜ mcp=жҳҜ вҖҰ`. renderUninstallSummary / buildUninstallSummaryCard (~line 947): the per-stage detail `value` switches from `cli.uninstall.stages.summary` raw counts to result words via t() вҖ” ranвҶ’'е·Іжё…зҗҶ {count} йЎ№' (cli.uninstall.stage.cleaned-count), nothing-removedвҶ’'е·ІжҳҜе№ІеҮҖ' (cli.uninstall.stage.already-clean), skippedвҶ’t('cli.shared.skipped'). The summary card already flows through createInstallRenderer вҶ’ renderSummaryCard (B-жЁӘзәҝ from TASK-002). Add the new human-copy keys to both locales; the StageName routing keys stay English.

criteria: uninstall.ts printUninstallPlanSummary no longer renders `bootstrap=вҖҰ`-style key=value via yesNoLabel for the stage actions (grep the plan-actions path вҖ” the `cli.uninstall.plan.actions` key with bootstrap/mcp/scaffold/store interpolation is replaced by per-stage human sentences)

buildUninstallSummaryCard detail values use result-word keys, not raw `removed=/skipped=/errors=` counts (grep buildUninstallSummaryCard вҖ” the ran-stage value uses cli.uninstall.stage.cleaned-count / already-clean, not cli.uninstall.stages.summary)
en.ts AND zh-CN.ts both define 'cli.uninstall.stage.cleaned-count' and 'cli.uninstall.stage.already-clean' (grep each in both files)
the uninstall summary card title flows through the shared renderer's B-жЁӘзәҝ (renderSummaryCard вҶ’ headerRule); no `в”Ӯ` gutter in the uninstall summary output
[UI-observable] running `fabric uninstall --dry-run` shows human action sentences (e.g. 'е°Ҷжё…зҗҶ Skills дёҺ hook и„ҡжң¬'), NOT 'bootstrap=жҳҜ mcp=жҳҜ scaffold=жҳҜ store=еҗҰ'
[UI-observable] running `fabric uninstall` shows a summary card with result words ('е·Іжё…зҗҶ N йЎ№' / 'е·ІжҳҜе№ІеҮҖ'), NOT 'removed=129 skipped=16'
pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared test exits 0 (locale parity) && pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test exits 0 (uninstall tests updated) && pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit exits 0
convergence.verification: grep the new keys in both locales; run uninstall command tests; eyeball `fabric uninstall --dry-run` and a real uninstall to confirm no jargon / raw counts.
convergence.definition_of_done: The uninstall plan preview and summary speak in human result words (no `key=жҳҜ/еҗҰ` jargon, no raw `removed=/skipped=` counts), render through the shared B-жЁӘзәҝ summary card, and stay symmetric with the install summary.

files.change: Plan preview: per-stage human action sentences instead of yesNoLabel key=value. Summary card detail: result words (cleaned-count / already-clean / skipped) instead of raw count interpolation. Title flows through renderSummaryCard B-жЁӘзәҝ.

Add cli.uninstall.stage.cleaned-count='{count} cleaned', cli.uninstall.stage.already-clean='already clean', and per-stage plan-action sentence keys (cli.uninstall.plan.action.bootstrap/mcp/scaffold/store).
Add the SAME keys: е·Іжё…зҗҶ {count} йЎ№ / е·ІжҳҜе№ІеҮҖ / е°Ҷжё…зҗҶ Skills дёҺ hook и„ҡжң¬ зӯүдәәиҜқеҸҘеӯҗ.

implementation: Add the human-copy + result-word keys to both locale tables.
Rewrite printUninstallPlanSummary stage-actions block to per-stage human sentences (enabled = action sentence, skipped = muted е°Ҷдҝқз•ҷ).
Rewrite buildUninstallSummaryCard detail values + renderStageResult detail to result words via t().
Update uninstall command tests to the new copy, then run shared + cli tests + tsc.

reference.pattern: install summary card via createInstallRenderer.renderSummaryCard (now B-жЁӘзәҝ from TASK-002); uninstall already shares that renderer вҖ” only the detail copy changes

rationale.chosen_approach: Reuse the shared renderer card (already symmetric) and only swap the leaked jargon/counts for localized human result words, keeping install вҶ” uninstall parity.
decision_factors: G3 root cause: uninstall reuses the renderer but speaks machine counts/keys

risks: StageName routing keys (bootstrap/mcp/...) must stay English вҖ” only the DISPLAY copy changes; do not rename the keys.
